rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2303.101, which governs enterprise zone designation based on poverty levels and federal designations.
quote:
An area automatically qualifies for designation as an enterprise zone if the area is:
(1) a block group, as defined by the most recent federal decennial census available at the time of designation, in which at least 20 percent of the residents of the block group have an income at or below 100 percent of the federal poverty level;
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns enterprise zone qualification criteria unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
